title: lepisorus ussuriensis var. distans
intro: Lepisorus ussuriensis var. distans is a variety of fern plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae, commonly found in East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Russia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Lepisorus ussuriensis var. distans has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
